subject: Assessment: Format Your Database Entry
instructionString:
Rookie,

Here are the exact specifications for the digital database. Don't make me repeat myself.

1. Name: Arial, 18pt
2. Basic Info: Arial, 14pt
3. Bio: Times New Roman, 12pt

Format your document accordingly before you submit it.

- Mrs. Santos

startingTextBlocks.text: Bio: I am a first-year journalism student, eager to uncover the truth and write compelling stories for The Paragon.

answerKey.targetTextSnippet: Bio: I am a first-year journalism student, eager to uncover the truth and write compelling stories for The Paragon.
